data.body:
Investigation findings (pre-classification):
1. Plugin plugin.json at .claude-plugin/plugin.json declares two entry points: commands (3 files: commit.md, end.md, review.md) and skills (32 directories with SKILL.md).
2. /reload-plugins reports '1 plugin · 3 skills' — only counting commands/, not skills/.
3. .claude/commands/*.md (23 redirect stubs) check plugin presence via 'claude plugin list' and emit PLUGIN_DETECTED or LOCAL_FALLBACK. On PLUGIN_DETECTED, they instruct Claude to call Skill(dso:skill-name).
4. At session start in worktree, dso: skills are NOT loaded (Skill tool returns 'Unknown skill'). After /reload-plugins, they ARE loaded.
5. installed_plugins.json registers plugin for projectPath /Users/.../digital-service-orchestra but worktree is at .../digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-*. Path mismatch may cause delayed loading.
6. Loop mechanism: .claude/commands/sprint.md detects PLUGIN_DETECTED → tells Claude to call Skill(dso:sprint) → Unknown skill → Claude re-reads command → PLUGIN_DETECTED → loop.
